source.notes: Based on the existing Figma map frame and observed component instances.

regions.purpose: 按地图模板预留游戏 Logo 图片区域，不渲染普通文字标题。
承载地图筛选、搜索和分类入口。

layout.scroll: Layout.Scroll instance x=252, y=102, w=12, h=586 inside Panel Content; used for the left filter list visual scrollbar.

regions.purpose: 作为贯穿整个弹窗的底层地图画布，展示地图底图、点位和地图交互层；Sidebar 与 Footer 叠在其上方。
pendingDataBoundElements: map background image or tile layer

layout.observedTooltipInstance: x=658, y=386, w=32, h=38; renderer anchor uses bottom-center tail point

regions.purpose: 展示选中点位或对象的说明信息。
Figma 中的 Windows 窗口最小化、最大化、关闭示意，不属于 H5 页面内组件。
承载地图页面的主要行动按钮；地图类型 v0 中用于取消所有筛选。

requiredRendererBehavior: Reject components not listed in the target region's allowedComponents.
Reject arbitrary HTML or arbitrary component code in AI output.
Map canvas content should support pan/drag and mouse-wheel zoom in the renderer/layout layer.
Map background/content scales with zoom; Tooltip markers keep a constant visual size while their positions are recalculated from map coordinates.
Tooltip markers must render below Layout.DescribeCard when overlapping.
Layout.DescribeCard title and close button must align on the same visual row when image and description are absent.
When the pointer is inside map.canvas, canvas drag and wheel zoom should prevent native image dragging and prevent the surrounding page from scrolling.
Do not render development-only counters or status text in final generated pages. Preview-only marker count text such as shown/total markers is not part of the Figma map template.
Bottom action button clears search text and all active filter selections.
Allow data-bound values only after datasource schema and mapping exist.
